title: China’s Housing Slump Shows Signs of Bottoming Out. We’ve Been Here Before.
summary_full: Property prices in Shanghai, in particular, are rebounding, but the national market still faces an enormous overhang — 90 million empty or unfinished apartments.
summary_public: Property prices in Shanghai, in particular, are rebounding, but the national market still faces an enormous overhang — 90 million empty or unfinished apartments.
